summary: Iteration 124 - Nexus 9.0 Remaining Fixes Testing Complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Verified all 10 code patches: (1) WebSocket cookie-based auth with token fallback in server.py and routes_yjs.py, (2) IntegrationSettings OAuth redirect_uri without /api prefix, (3) DocsPreviewPanel blob-based downloads with BlobIframe/BlobImage, (4) DesktopBridgePanel uses window.location.origin instead of process.env URL, (5) ReplayPage uses relative /api pattern, (6) DownloadPage uses relative /api path, (7) DocsPanel has no BACKEND_URL import, (8) ImageGenPanel has nano_banana option, (9) routes_image_gen.py has nano_banana handler and Imagen 4 :generateImages endpoint, (10) Rate limiting middleware exists and is wired in server.py.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py websocket_channel: Cookie auth checked first (line 265-278), then token fallback (line 281-300) - correctly implements N7R-004
routes_yjs.py yjs_sync: Same cookie-first pattern with token fallback (lines 56-94)
DocsPreviewPanel.js: No BACKEND_URL import, uses BlobIframe and BlobImage components for blob-based file handling
DesktopBridgePanel.js: Uses window.location.origin for server URL, api.get for blob downloads
ReplayPage.js: Uses conditional API URL - '/api' for production, REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL only for localhost
DocsPanel.js: No BACKEND_URL import, uses api from @/App
ImageGenPanel.js: Has nano_banana option in provider dropdown (line 125)
routes_image_gen.py: Has nano_banana provider handler with call_nano_banana import (lines 124-129), Imagen 4 uses :generateImages endpoint (line 111)
nexus_middleware.py: rate_limit_and_size_middleware exists and is wired in server.py (line 213)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Landing page and auth page load correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Nexus 9.0 remaining fixes verified. Key verifications: (1) WebSocket cookie auth in server.py lines 265-300 and routes_yjs.py lines 56-94, (2) All BACKEND_URL removals from frontend files confirmed, (3) Image gen provider wiring with nano_banana and Imagen 4 :generateImages endpoint confirmed, (4) Rate limiting middleware exists in nexus_middleware.py and is wired in server.py. Login API works via curl (returns session_token), frontend loads correctly.

fixes_verified.P0_websocket_cookie_auth: VERIFIED - server.py websocket_channel and routes_yjs.py yjs_sync both use cookie auth first with token fallback
fixes_verified.P1_docs_preview_panel_blob_downloads: VERIFIED - No BACKEND_URL, uses BlobIframe and BlobImage components
fixes_verified.P1_desktop_bridge_panel_blob_download: VERIFIED - Uses window.location.origin and api.get for blob downloads
fixes_verified.P1_replay_page_relative_api: VERIFIED - Uses relative /api pattern for production
fixes_verified.P1_nano_banana_wired: VERIFIED - call_nano_banana imported and used in routes_image_gen.py
fixes_verified.P2_rate_limiting_middleware: VERIFIED - rate_limit_and_size_middleware exists in nexus_middleware.py and wired in server.py
